HTML template for testing boolean value rendering in Flask.

# Purpose
The template code uses a conditional statement to check if the variable `value` is of the boolean type. If `value` is boolean, the template renders the text `Success!`. This logic is typically used in templating engines to control the output based on the data type of a variable.
